items.title: UNHCR: Congo fighting leaves 350,000 without shelter | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The UN refugee agency voiced concern at the ‘rapidly deteriorating’ situation in the eastern Democratic Republic of Congo, saying the war had left around 350,000 displaced people with no roof over their heads.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #congo #unhcr #m23

items.title: Kenya's Mijikenda community struggles for colonial reparations | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>African leaders are meeting in Ethiopia this weekend to push for reparations for slavery and colonialism. Mijikenda elder David Garera told Reuters that deforestation and historical land dispossessions have disrupted his people's land and traditions.

items.title: US retail sales post largest drop in nearly two years in January | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>US retail sales dropped by the most in nearly two years in January, likely weighed down by frigid temperatures, wildfires and motor vehicle shortages, suggesting a sharp slowdown in economic growth early in the first quarter.
#News #usaeconomy #retail #consumer  #Reuters #Newsfeed

items.title: DC's 'hands off our drag' protest
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>🎭 Clad in full drag and with Pride flags in tow, a 'hands off our drag’ march across downtown Washington, D.C., culminated at the iconic Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts, where protesters sent a clear message to its now chairman and U.S. President Donald Trump: “You can’t erase drag — we’ll come right back.”   
 
Protesters, some of whom have performed at the Kennedy Center in the past, asserted that drag is a form of art, and that supporters of drag are supporters of the arts.
 
The protest, co-organized by several D.C. local collectives, came just after Trump took over the Center, with his board appointees naming him chair and then firing its president, Deborah Rutter. 🔗 Tap the link to find out which former U.S. ambassador now serves as the Center's interim president. Gavino Garay was on the ground.
 
#KennedyCenter #KennedyCenterHonors #drag #DonaldTrump #handsoffDC #handsoffourdrag

Read the story here:

items.content:
